title: Build Admin Panel for Product Management

requirements.text: Add a protected Admin page (route: /admin) accessible from the navigation (or a direct URL). The page must include a product management interface with: a table/list of all existing products showing name, category, price, stock, and featured status; an 'Add Product' form/modal with fields for name, category, description, price, imageUrl, stock quantity, and featured flag; an 'Edit' action per product that pre-fills the form with existing values; and a 'Delete' action per product with a confirmation prompt.

quotes: Add new products (name, category, description, price, stock, image URL, featured flag)

acceptanceCriteria: Navigating to /admin renders the Admin Panel page
All existing products are listed in a table with name, category, price, stock, and featured columns
Clicking 'Add Product' opens a form/modal with all required fields (name, category, description, price, imageUrl, stock, featured)
Submitting the Add Product form calls the backend addProduct method and the product list refreshes
Clicking 'Edit' on a product pre-fills the form with that product's current values
Submitting the Edit form calls the backend updateProduct method and the list reflects the changes
Clicking 'Delete' on a product shows a confirmation prompt; confirming calls the backend deleteProduct method and removes the product from the list
Form validation prevents submission with missing required fields
Success and error states are communicated via toast notifications

requirements.text: Ensure the backend exposes addProduct, updateProduct, and deleteProduct methods that the Admin Panel frontend can call. The addProduct method accepts all product fields (name, category, description, price, imageUrl, stock, featured) and returns the new product ID. The updateProduct method accepts a product ID and updated fields. The deleteProduct method accepts a product ID and removes the product.

quotes: Add new products (name, category, description, price, stock, image URL, featured flag)

acceptanceCriteria: addProduct accepts all product fields and returns the new product's ID
updateProduct accepts a product ID and partial or full product fields and updates the stored record
deleteProduct accepts a product ID and removes the product from the store
All three methods are callable from the frontend actor interface
getProducts reflects additions, edits, and deletions immediately after each operation

constraints: Do not modify files under frontend/src/hooks/ or frontend/src/components/ui/
All backend logic must remain in the single actor in backend/main.mo
nonGoals: Authentication/authorization gating for the admin page (no login required for now)
Order management in the admin panel
Image upload functionality — image URLs are entered as text
